summary: Iteration 92: Directed Studio v2 - Screenwriter Chat + Multi-Scene Production Testing. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified DirectedStudio component loads correctly with 4-step navigation (Roteiro, Personagens, Produção, Resultado). An in-progress production was detected and resumed automatically, showing Sora 2 video generation in progress for 2 scenes.
critical_code_review_comments: studio.py: POST /api/studio/chat correctly creates new project or updates existing one
studio.py: POST /api/studio/start-production validates scenes exist before starting (returns 400 if no scenes)
studio.py: GET /api/studio/projects/{id}/status returns proper status structure with scenes, characters, outputs
studio.py: DELETE /api/studio/projects/{id} correctly removes project and returns 404 on subsequent status check
DirectedStudio.jsx: 4-step navigation (Roteiro, Personagens, Produção, Resultado) works correctly
DirectedStudio.jsx: Step navigation is correctly blocked during production (generating=true)
DirectedStudio.jsx: Component auto-resumes in-progress productions on load
DirectedStudio.jsx: Screenwriter chat sends messages and receives AI-generated scenes
DirectedStudio.jsx: Production progress shows scene-by-scene status with Sora 2 video generation
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed projects via API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Directed Studio v2 feature fully working. Backend uses 'access_token' field (not 'token') from login response. To reach Directed Studio UI: go to /marketing/studio and click the 'Estúdio' campaign type button (data-testid='campaign-type-directed_studio'). The screenwriter chat endpoint (POST /api/studio/chat) takes 30-60 seconds to respond as it calls Claude. The component auto-resumes in-progress productions. Step navigation is blocked during production. Sora 2 video generation takes 2-5 minutes per scene.

backend_api_tests.GET /api/studio/projects/{id}/status: PASS - Returns status, scenes, characters, outputs
backend_api_tests.DELETE /api/studio/projects/{id}: PASS - Deletes project, returns 404 on subsequent status check
backend_api_tests.POST /api/studio/chat (new project): PASS - Creates project and returns scenes
backend_api_tests.POST /api/studio/chat (scene generation): PASS - Generates scenes and characters from prompt
backend_api_tests.End-to-end flow: PASS - Chat to production validation works

frontend_ui_tests.login: PASS - Login with test credentials works
frontend_ui_tests.click_estudio_button: PASS - Estúdio campaign type button clickable
frontend_ui_tests.4_step_navigation: PASS - All 4 steps visible (Roteiro, Personagens, Produção, Resultado)
frontend_ui_tests.production_progress: PASS - Shows scene-by-scene progress with Sora 2 status
